description: This image is a screenshot of a user interface displaying an "Additional Documents" section. Under the "Uploaded Document/s" heading, two clickable links are visible: "CLMS_CLCplus_RASTER_2018_010m_03005_V1_0.xml" and "EAGLEBarcodingTemplate-CLCBackbone2018-7066330542AA7E9E1C6E..." (the end of the second filename is truncated). Below these document links, several organisational logos are present from left to right: the European Union flag with "Copernicus Europe's eyes on Earth" text, the "EIONET Action Group EAGLE Land Monitoring in Europe" logo, the European Commission logo, and the "European Environment Agency" (EEA) logo. A blue circular icon with a white question mark, likely a help or feedback button, is visible on the far right, partially obscured by a scrollbar. The filenames contain references to "CLCplus", "RASTER", "2018", and "EAGLE".
